components.name: Market Decision Integrity Index
components.reason: Needs versioned methodology authority, proper outcome state distinction, coverage-aware publication, and integration with compounding-intelligence.ts cross-moat brief. In-memory only — needs durable methodology store.

components.name: Public Decision Learning Log
components.reason: Needs proper falsification semantics (not scenarioLink as condition), explicit edition lineage fields, and durable store. Must not manufacture conditions from URLs.
components.duplicateAuthorityRisk: LOW — no existing Learning Log module

components.name: Cross-Edition Call Review
components.reason: Needs explicit edition lineage fields (not versionHistory.note), proper lineage states, and durable store. Must not infer edition IDs from free-form notes.

components.name: Customer Falsification Watchdog
components.reason: In-memory only. Must use existing durable store infrastructure (sqlite-interaction-store pattern). Needs tenant isolation, restart survival, draft-GMI rejection.

components.name: Canonical Decision Graph
components.reason: In-memory only. Must use existing durable store infrastructure. Needs tenant partition, case partition, node version, edge provenance, correction, supersession, deletion propagation.
components.duplicateAuthorityRisk: MEDIUM — must not duplicate strategic twin semantics. The graph stores relationships BETWEEN decisions; the twin stores per-customer state. These are complementary, not competing.

components.name: Governance Trust Centre
components.reason: Must derive from three-layer estate proof (observation → evaluation → verdict), not from simple contract existence. Needs proper state taxonomy (GOVERNANCE_VERIFIED, CONTROLLED_BY_DESIGN, etc.), not green/red.
components.duplicateAuthorityRisk: LOW — no existing Trust Centre module

components.name: Governance Receipt
components.reason: Must be observation-derived with evidence references, receipt hash, verification function. Must not repeat catalogue fields as proof.

components.name: Customer Corridor Map
components.reason: The corridor map must derive from the existing deriveNextAdmissibleMove engine and strategic twin, not from a static completedProducts list. The map is a customer-visible projection of the existing next-move engine.
components.duplicateAuthorityRisk: HIGH — must not create a second next-move authority. The existing deriveNextAdmissibleMove is canonical.

components.name: Corridor Progression Analytics
components.reason: In-memory only. Must use existing durable store infrastructure. Needs tenant isolation, duplicate event idempotency, no sensitive decision payload.

components.name: Cross-Pillar Acceptance Test
components.reason: Must be one complete chained scenario with negative variants, not isolated piece tests. Belongs in tests/hostile-audit/.
